name: meta-reklam-panel
description: Meta Ads Management Dashboard with Antigravity integration for real-time campaign tracking

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend

author: sinan722007
